name: @ebenova/insights-mcp
description: MCP server for Ebenova Insights — monitor Reddit and Nairaland for keywords, get AI-drafted replies, manage monitors. For Claude Desktop, Cursor, and any MCP-compatible AI assistant.
author: Ebenova Solutions <api@ebenova.dev>

EBENOVA_API_KEY.description: Your Ebenova API key with Insights access. Get one at https://ebenova.dev/insights

INSIGHTS_API_BASE.description: Insights API base URL (optional, defaults to https://insights.ebenova.dev)
